channel.title: Pages on 橘子
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on 橘子

item.description:
media:

  • name: post-images
    label: 文章配图
    input: content/post
    output: /content/post
    categories: [image]
  • name: assets
    label: 站点资源
    input: assets
    output: /assets
    categories: [image]
  • name: banner
    label: 站点头图
    input: assets/images
    output: /assets/images
    categories: [image]

content:

内容页面分组

  • name: content-pages
    label: 📝 内容页面
    type: group
    items:

    博客文章列表

    • name: posts
      label: 📝 博客文章
      type: collection
      path: content/post
      format: raw-frontmatter
      filename:
      template: “{title}.md”
      field: title
      exclude: ["/images/", “/*.avif”, “/.webp”, “**/.png”, “**/*.jpg”]
      view:
      primary: title
      fields: [title, date, tags, categories, draft, pinned]
      sort: [“date desc”, “title asc”]
      search: [title, description, tags, categories]
      default:
      sort: date
      order: desc
      fields:
      • name: title
        label: 标题
        type: string
        required: true
      • name: date
        label: 发布时间
        type: date
        required: true
        options:
        time: true
        format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss+08:00
      • name: updated
        label: 更新时间
        type: date
        options:
        time: true
        format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss+08:00
      • name: draft
        label: 草稿
        type: boolean
        default: false
      • name: description
        label: 文章摘要
        type: text
      • name: image
        label: 封面图
        type: image
      • name: tags
        label: 标签
        type: select
        options:
        multiple: true
        creatable: true
      • name: categories
        label: 分类
        type: select
        options:
        multiple: true
        creatable: true
      • name: lang
        label: 语言
        type: select
        options:
        values:
        - { label: 中文, value: "" }
        - { label: English, value: en }
        - { label: 日本語, value: ja }
        - { label: 繁體中文, value: zh_TW }
        - { label: Русский, value: ru }
      • name: pinned
        label: 置顶
        type: boolean
        default: false
      • name: author
        label: 作者
        type: string
      • name: sourceLink
        label: 原文链接
        type: string
      • name: licenseName
        label: 许可协议名称
        type: string
      • name: licenseUrl
        label: 许可协议链接
        type: string
      • name: comment
        label: 启用评论
        type: boolean
        default: true
      • name: password
        label: 文章密码
        type: string
      • name: passwordHint
        label: 密码提示
        type: string
      • name: body
        label: 正文
        type: rich-text
        required: true

    关于页面 /about

    • name: about
      label: 📄 关于页面
      type: file
      path: content/about/_index.md
      format: raw-frontmatter
      fields:
      • name: title
        label: 页面标题
        type: string
        default: “关于我”
      • name: body
        label: 正文
        type: rich-text

    友情链接页面 /page/links

    • name: friends
      label: 🔗 友情链接
      type: file
      path: content/page/links/index.md
      format: raw-frontmatter
      fields:
      • name: title
        label: 页面标题
        type: string
        default: 友情链接
      • name: description
        label: 页面描述
        type: string
      • name: body
        label: 正文
        type: rich-text

站点基础设置分组

  • name: site-settings
    label: ⚙️ 站点设置
    type: group
    description: 站点标题、域名、个人头像昵称、社交链接、公告、版权
    items:
    • name: site-config
      label: 🌐 站点主配置
      type: file
      path: hugo.yaml
      format: code
    • name: profile-config
      label: 👤 侧边栏个人信息
      type: file
      path: hugo.yaml
      format: code
    • name: announcement-config
      label: 📢 首页公告栏
      type: file
      path: config/announcement.toml
      format: code
    • name: license-config
      label: 📜 底部版权协议
      type: file
      path: config/license.toml
      format: code

布局外观分组（侧边栏/导航/页脚/代码样式）

  • name: layout-appearance
    label: 🎨 布局与外观
    type: group
    description: 侧边导航、侧边栏样式、页脚、代码块配色
    items:
    • name: nav-bar-config
      label: 🧭 侧边导航菜单
      type: file
      path: config/nav.toml
      format: code
    • name: sidebar-config
      label: 📑 侧边栏样式
      type: file
      path: themes/hugo-theme-stack/assets/scss/partials/sidebar.scss
      format: code
    • name: footer-config
      label: 📎 页脚底部样式
      type: file
      path: themes/hugo-theme-stack/assets/scss/partials/footer.scss
      format: code
    • name: expressive-code-config
      label: 💻 代码块样式
      type: file
      path: themes/hugo-theme-stack/assets/scss/partials/article.scss
      format: code

功能配置分组

  • name: feature-settings
    label: 🔧 功能配置
    type: group
    items:
    • name: comment-config
      label: 💬 评论系统
      type: file
      path: hugo.yaml
      format: code
    • name: analytics-config
      label: 📊 访问统计
      type: file
      path: config/analytics.toml
      format: code
    • name: friends-data
      label: 🔗 友链数据列表
      type: file
      path: data/friends.yaml
      format: yaml-frontmatter
    • name: pio-config
      label: 🎭 看板娘
      type: file
      path: config/live2d.toml
      format: code

settings:
content:
merge: false

item.title: 关于/about
item.description: This is a test page for i18n support.
